channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Python (Daily)

item.title: 🐍 destinyfrancis/openclaw-knowledge-distiller (14 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: destinyfrancis

📝 Repository: destinyfrancis/openclaw-knowledge-distiller

📄 Descrizione: Open CLAW Knowledge Distiller · 龍蝦知識蒸餾器 — Turn YouTube/Bilibili videos into structured knowledge articles. Local Qwen3-ASR MLX + AI summarization. MCP server for Claude Code / Open CLAW agents.
